snippets.description:
FetchInventory list remote source's inventory of VMs.
The remote source is the onprem vCenter (remote in the sense it's not in
Compute Engine). The inventory describes the list of existing VMs in that
source. Note that this operation lists the VMs on the remote source, as
opposed to listing the MigratingVms resources in the vmmigration service.
snippets.title: vmmigration FetchInventory Sample

snippets.description:
FetchStorageInventory list remote source's inventory of storage resources.
The remote source is another cloud vendor (e.g. AWS, Azure).
The inventory describes the list of existing storage resources in that
source. Note that this operation lists the resources on the remote source,
as opposed to listing the MigratingVms resources in the vmmigration
service.
snippets.title: vmmigration FetchStorageInventory Sample

snippets.description:
FinalizeMigration marks a migration as completed, deleting migration resources that are no
longer being used. Only applicable after cutover is done.
snippets.title: vmmigration FinalizeMigration Sample

snippets.description:
PauseMigration pauses a migration for a VM. If cycle tasks are running they will be
cancelled, preserving source task data. Further replication cycles will not
be triggered while the VM is paused.
snippets.title: vmmigration PauseMigration Sample

snippets.description: RemoveGroupMigration removes a MigratingVm from a Group.
snippets.title: vmmigration RemoveGroupMigration Sample

snippets.description:
ResumeMigration resumes a migration for a VM. When called on a paused migration, will start
the process of uploading data and creating snapshots; when called on a
completed cut-over migration, will update the migration to active state and
start the process of uploading data and creating snapshots.
snippets.title: vmmigration ResumeMigration Sample

snippets.description: RunDiskMigrationJob runs the disk migration job.
snippets.title: vmmigration RunDiskMigrationJob Sample

snippets.description:
StartMigration starts migration for a VM. Starts the process of uploading
data and creating snapshots, in replication cycles scheduled by the policy.
snippets.title: vmmigration StartMigration Sample
